Code fragment: public final TableField<ManagerRecord, ManagerRole> ROLE = createField(DSL.name("role"), SQLDataType.VARCHAR(7).nullable(false).defaultValue(DSL.inline("project", SQLDataType.VARCHAR)).asEnumDataType(ManagerRole.class), this, "");

Code fragment: .select(GAME.asterisk())
Explanation: Using GAME.asterisk() fetches all columns from the GAME table, which can retrieve unnecessary data and cause maintenance issues if the table schema changes. Replace with explicit column selection, e.g., .select(GAME.APP_ID, GAME.NAME, ...) to fetch only the required columns.
